description: A public collection of agent templates for the Super Agent app.

skills.name: agent-pill
skills.description: Onboarding agent that interviews you, snoops your tools (with permission), and builds your highest-impact first Super Agent -- both as a created agent and a copyable prompt.

skills.name: inbox-manager
skills.description: Email management agent that helps users organize their Gmail inbox, screen and categorize emails as important vs marketing, take actions like marking as read or sending replies, and unsubscribe from unwanted mailing lists.
